---
title: "References & Resources"
---

## Primary Data Sources

**AER Retail Performance Reporting Hub**
https://www.aer.gov.au/industry/retail/performance-reporting
Main landing page for all quarterly Schedule 2/3/4 data files.

**AER Retail Performance Data — Q4 2023–24**
https://www.aer.gov.au/publications/reports/performance/retail-energy-market-performance-update-quarter-4-2023-24
5 quarters + 5 years annual data in Excel. Customer numbers, switching, complaints, hardship, disconnections by retailer and state.

**AER Annual Retail Markets Report 2023–24**
https://www.aer.gov.au/publications/reports/performance/annual-retail-markets-report-2023-24
Narrative companion to the data. Pricing, affordability, market concentration, switching trends.

**AEMO Aggregated Price & Demand Data**
https://www.aemo.com.au/energy-systems/electricity/national-electricity-market-nem/data-nem/aggregated-data
Wholesale price (RRP) and demand by state, 30-min intervals, back to 1998. CSV download per state per month.

**AEMO Operational Demand Data**
https://www.aemo.com.au/energy-systems/electricity/national-electricity-market-nem/data-nem/operational-demand-data
Half-hourly and daily demand by NEM region.

---

## DMO / VDO Reference Prices

**AER DMO 7 Final Determination (2025–26)**
https://www.aer.gov.au/industry/registers/resources/reviews/default-market-offer-prices-2025-26
Most current DMO. Includes network cost breakdowns and retail margin methodology.

**ESC Victorian Default Offer (VDO) Historical Decisions**
https://www.esc.vic.gov.au/electricity-and-gas/tariffs-and-benchmarks/victorian-default-offer
VDO determinations — Victoria's equivalent of the DMO, set by the ESC.

---

## Context & Background

**AER State of the Energy Market 2025 — Chapter 6 (Retail)**
https://www.aer.gov.au/system/files/2025-08/State%20of%20the%20energy%20market%202025%20-%20Chapter%206%20-%20Retail%20energy%20markets%20and%20energy%20consumers.pdf
Annual deep-dive into retail market. DMO/VDO trends, market concentration, pricing comparisons.

**Australian Energy Statistics 2025 (DCCEEW)**
https://www.energy.gov.au/publications/australian-energy-update-2024
Official national energy stats — consumption, generation mix, renewables growth.

---

## Kaggle — Ready-to-Go Datasets

**NSW Electricity Price & Demand 2018–2023**
https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/joebeachcapital/nsw-australia-electricity-demand-2018-2023
Pre-cleaned AEMO data for NSW, 30-min intervals. Good for getting R pipeline running fast.

**Victoria Daily Electricity Price & Demand 2015–2020**
https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/aramacus/electricity-demand-in-victoria-australia
Clean Victoria data. Slightly older but simple and ready to go.
